title: Fix 500 Error on Login Page due to Missing DB Schema
why: Prisma threw 'table User does not exist' during Google OAuth login because the database volume was empty.
root_cause: Prisma threw 'table User does not exist' during Google OAuth login because the database volume was empty.
solution: Ran npm run db:push to generate the tables and npm run db:seed to create the initial admin account, resolving the 500 error.
